summary: Made two surgical seam edits: removed a duplicated physical beat in the grave-side exchange and tightened the chapter exit so Della moves toward the children's row that opens chapter 7. The opening was reviewed and left unchanged because its weather-and-arrival construction already differs from the adjacent visible chapter opening.
edits: Removed a repeated crouch-and-clay gesture to keep the exchange continuous without re-staging Della's position.
Adjusted the closing sentence so Della heads toward the children's row, improving the handoff into chapter 7's opening cemetery work scene.
